meaning: n.引用语,价格,报价单,行情表
examples: You need to get a written quotation before they start work.
But I still use the word "event" anyway, use it carefully with quotation marks.
Each chapter begins with a quotation.
The quotation is engraved on the northeast corner of the National Archives Building in Washington.
Situation C: likewise, but with a citation to that third article, but no quotation marks.
